svg.title: KBAgent — component diagram
svg.desc: Tất cả modules và kết nối giữa chúng, phân theo layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Dashboard UI: VSCode webview panel, 4 tabs, đọc từ KB Engine, copy prompts cho Copilot')
sendPrompt('Search UI: full-text search qua KB, graph nodes, intents, rules, CLI docs')
sendPrompt('kbx intent: create, activate, close, archive, status, list')
sendPrompt('kbx chaos: compute score, --scan-src, snapshot, history')
sendPrompt('kbx maintain: scan, propose fix intents, approve flow')
sendPrompt('kbx graph: export, validate ontology, find cycles, query nodes')
sendPrompt('Goal Engine: CRUD goals, eval criteria via :ADVANCES edges, emit warning khi drift')
sendPrompt('Intent Engine: lifecycle state machine, goal alignment check, task management, repos[] tagging')
sendPrompt('Rule Engine: KBX-xxx lifecycle, draft→active→retired, validate against ontology contract')
sendPrompt('Chaos Engine: 7-dimension score, --scan-src cyclomatic, cognitive drift, snapshot history, spike detect')
sendPrompt('Retro Engine: điểm ghi graph duy nhất — evidence metadata, :Lesson, :ADVANCES edges, chaos snapshot')
sendPrompt('Onboarding Engine: interview flow, system-map gen, KB scaffold, chaos baseline, retrofit scan')
sendPrompt('Checkpoint Engine: save/load focus state — branch, intent, step, staged files, focus.md')
sendPrompt('Update Engine: diff logic vs NL, normalize NL → canonical, meaning diff, regression test, version bump')
sendPrompt('Signal Bus: chaos spike, goal drift, intent out-of-goal, doc stale — fan-out tới Dashboard + Maintain')
g.text: chaos spike · goal drift · intent oog · doc stale · maintain needed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('KB File Store: 16-tier Markdown files, intents/_active/_backlog/_archive, focus.md, debt-index, entropy-index')
sendPrompt('Unified Graph: 1 DB, :Goal :Intent :Rule :KBDoc :Code :Signal :Release :Lesson, evidence on all edges')
sendPrompt('Chaos History: ndjson append-only snapshots, trend, spike detect, forward estimates')
sendPrompt('Checkpoint Store: save/load focus state, branch + intent + staged + step, history list')
sendPrompt('Git adapter: multi-repo status, branch, PRs, commit history, impact on repos[]')
sendPrompt('Infra adapter: Docker, staging/prod health, deploy status, env vars')
sendPrompt('LLM adapter: Copilot / Claude API — suggest, interview, NL normalize, KB draft từ source')
sendPrompt('Source scanner: AST parse, cyclomatic complexity, circular deps, fan-in, dead code detect')
sendPrompt('Export adapter: JSON/Cypher/ZIP — graph export, KB archive, offboarding bundle')

svg.text: Ghi vào Unified Graph chỉ qua Retro engine — mọi engine khác chỉ được đọc.
NL patch đi qua Update engine · normalize → diff → human validate → apply as intent → Flow 3→4.
